title: More Armors+ By Anoosh
description: More Armors+ by Anoosh adds new armor sets crafted from various materials like amethyst, emerald, and even redstone. This mod gives you new and creative ways to protect yourself and express your style in the game.
body:
More Armors+ By Anoosh
Welcome to More Armors+, a mod that I, Anoosh, created to expand the variety of armors available in Minecraft. This mod introduces new armor sets crafted from a wide range of materials, including amethyst, coal, emerald, and even redstone. My goal was to add more creative and fun options for players to explore in their survival worlds. I hope these new armor sets make your Minecraft journey more exciting and give you more ways to express your style!

What's Included:

Amethyst Armor: A beautiful and durable armor set crafted from amethyst shards. It offers good protection and a unique purple shimmer, making you stand out.

![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f63525eb18d82aad4193c30f31fcb9fa91990312.png)


Coal Armor: A simple and accessible armor set made from coal. It provides basic protection and is a great option for early-game use when you have a lot of spare coal.

![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61265dbc3195dc1c30d95e9f0a69f6b5498a1a44.png)


Echo Armor: A mysterious and powerful armor set crafted from Echo Shards. This armor offers excellent protection and a unique dark look, perfect for exploring deep, dark caves.

![e](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da4f6758c18b11144a081a1e14b687d39374fe0.png)


Emerald Armor: A valuable and strong armor set made from emeralds. While not as durable as diamond, it offers a great level of protection and is a great way to use your emeralds.

![e2a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e2767e3d19aa10e98143dee4331e0543d3aa283.png)


Prismarine Armor: An underwater-themed armor set crafted from prismarine shards. It offers good protection and looks great for underwater adventures.

![p](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66d0c3c0b9bfce12574cdd71158f84685bbe7492.png)


Quartz Armor: A durable and elegant armor set made from quartz. It provides good protection and a clean, white look, perfect for builders and survivalists alike.

![q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/980018942b4083480f0dd4812c7e3a433e006152.png)


Redstone Armor: A unique armor set crafted from redstone dust. It offers a decent level of protection and has a cool, glowing effect, making you look like a walking redstone contraption!

![r](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6ad9a2cfa3a77d3c25ca632d4deee2bd2520e4e.png)


I'm always looking for feedback and new ideas. Feel free to leave a comment with your suggestions!
